backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and contact form submission with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: updating the business name to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' across all frontend UI files, and updating all SEO metadata site-wide to use the same business name.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of per-file summaries for all frontend source files, describing each file's role and noting that 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' branding has been applied throughout.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, foregrounds, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with fully populated SEO metadata (title, meta description, Open Graph, Twitter cards, JSON-LD LocalBusiness) all referencing 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' as the business name.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with a shared Navbar/Footer layout and three routes: Home (/), Services (/services), and Contact (/contact).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column responsive footer displaying the 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' brand, quick navigation links, a services list, and contact details with social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation bar showing the 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' logo and brand text, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, a 'Get Connected' CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: A React component that dynamically sets document title and meta tags (description, Open Graph, Twitter) for SEO purposes, resetting to a default title on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitContactForm` mutation hook that submits a contact form (name, phone, message) via the backend actor and invalidates the contactForms query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based design tokens for light/dark themes, and defines custom utility classes for glow effects, gradient text, and grid backgrounds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: A contact page for Rahul Cyber Cafe that displays location, phone, and hours info cards alongside a form (name, phone, message) that submits via the useSubmitContactForm mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The home page for Rahul Cyber Cafe featuring a hero section, featured government document services grid, stats bar, and a 'why us' highlights list, with SEO metadata set via SEOHead.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Defines and renders the Services page for Rahul Cyber Cafe, listing offerings like internet browsing, computer rental, government document services (Aadhaar, PAN, Ration Card, etc.), printing, and scanning as styled cards with features and badges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (cyber-cyan, cyber-green, dark variants), glow box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state, architectural notes, known issues, and feature list for the Rahul Cyber Cafe public-facing marketing website focused on SEO and government document services.
